raw_consumer_statement:
There was a credit card transfer from Barclays jet blue to XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year>. 
In the amount of {$4900.00} dollars. I was notified in XXXX of this. 
I called Barclays fraudulent dept to notify them that this was not my doing. I spoke to 19 different people in the company including supervisors that I did not authorize this. I also contacted XXXX XXXX XXXX and let them know of this fraudulent charge. I asked for a statement from XXXX XXXX XXXX showing my current and past purchases with my account ( last XXXX numbers ) on the statement, and Barclays is still holding me responsible with late fees and interest charges. 
The XXXX  XXXX XXXX transfer is not my account number ( last XXXX ) .My account number is on the statement that XXXX XXXX XXXX sent to them. 
This has since ruined my credit score from an XXXX to a XXXX.
